title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates!
